lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Welcome to the farming guild. How may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the guild.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: After the Shayzien Army cleared out the lizardmen in this area, I founded this guild with some fellow Hosidius farmers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why here? Why not within the safety of Kourend?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: The heat of the volcano allows us to grow things here that would never survive in the climate of Kourend. The discoveries we have made are worth the extra risk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough, anything else I should know about the guild?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: The guild is split into three tiers, with only advanced farmers being allowed access to the upper echelons.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Would you like to hear more about one of the tiers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the beginner tier.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: In the beginner tier you can access farming patches for cacti, allotments, bushes and flowers. You'll also find some shops with useful farming supplies.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Would you like to hear more about another tier?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the intermediate tier.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: In the intermediate tier you can access farming patches for herbs and trees. You'll also find the anima and hespori patches which are unique to this guild.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Would you like to hear more about another tier?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the advanced tier.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: In the advanced tier you can access farming patches for fruit trees and spirit trees. You'll also find the redwood and celastrus patches which are unique to this guild.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Would you like to hear more about another tier?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: My name is Jane, and I am the founder of the Farming Guild.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any jobs for me?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Well we always need to rotate the crops we're growing to stop the soil from tiring due to lack of nutrients. It would be great if you could help out with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would I need to do?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: If you're interested, I can give you a farming contract which tells you what to plant within the guild. Complete the contract, and I'll give you some seeds as a thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a farming contract.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: What kind of contract would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have an easy contract please?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Please could you grow [a/some] [plant(s)] for us? I'll reward you once you have checked [its/their] health.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Please could you grow some [plant]s for us? I'll reward you once they have been fully harvested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a medium contract please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a hard contract please?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Please could you grow [a/some] [plant(s)] for us? I'll reward you once you have checked [its/their] health.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Please could you grow some [plant]s for us? I'll reward you once they have been fully harvested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed my farming contract.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: You'll be wanting a reward then. Come back when you have some room to take it.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: You'll be wanting a reward then. Here's a seed pack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Fair enough. Come back when you want another one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's my current farming contract?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: We need you to grow [a/some] [plant(s)]. I'll reward you once you have checked [its/their] health.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: We need you to grow some [plant]s. I'll reward you once they've been fully harvested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything easier?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I suppose I could give you a different contract, if you're sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many farming contracts have I completed?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: You've completed [amount] farming contracts.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I trade in some spirit seeds?

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Of course, I will also take potted spirit seeds and saplings. What would you like to trade in?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just passing by.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Sure, let me know if there's anything I can do for you.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seeds to trade in, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seedlings to trade in, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I'm afraid you have no Spirit seedling(w)s to trade in, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I'm afraid you have no Spirit saplings to trade in, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: I'm afraid you have nothing to trade in, come back when you do.

sections.title: Entering different areas of the Farming guild without the required level

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Hey! You need a Farming level of at least 65 to enter that area of the Farming Guild.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: Hey! You need a Farming level of at least 85 to enter that area of the Farming Guild.

sections.title: Attempting to pick the same specific contract back to back

lines.speaker: Guildmaster Jane
lines.text: While I am letting you pick your own contracts, I won't allow you to pick the same one again. We must ensure that the patches can be rotated to stop the soil tiring from lack of nutrients.
